title: Comforting Roasted British Potato Stir-fry
description: A comforting keto-friendly stir-fry featuring roasted potatoes and other vegetables that are tender and lightly seasoned.

ingredients.name: sauce mix (optional)
ingredients.notes: combine with coconut aminos for low-carb option

instructions: Wash and peel potatoes, carrots, and onions. Slice the potatoes into rounds about 5 mm thick.
Trim the tops of the carrots slightly, slice them lengthwise into thin rounds, then cut these rounds in half diagonally.
In a bowl, mix minced garlic with the sauce mix (if using). Season lightly with salt and pepper.
Place all prepared vegetables on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with some oil, if desired, and spread evenly.
Roast in preheated oven for about 30 minutes until golden brown and tender.
While the veggies are roasting, heat a pan over medium-high heat and add the seasoned garlic mixture to the pan.
Add onions when vegetables start to sweat lightly. Cook until fragrant and translucent.
Toss cooked vegetables with onions and any remaining sauce in the pan for a quick stir-fry.
Serve hot as a side dish or over keto-friendly greens for a main course.
